_doc: Substrate list for the repeatable proxy↔𝒱̂ validation loop. Run: pnpm validate-substrates [name]. Each substrate needs a committed codenuke.benchmark/ (held-out change-requests) and candidate git refs (code-states spanning a reduction range from the baseline). {repo} expands to the absolute repo path. implementer=null uses the codex LLM implementer (billable, adapts per candidate → 𝒱̂ co-varies); a command string uses a deterministic scripted implementer (INV-5).
